title: Netherite Shape and Style Armour
description: Makes diamond, iron, and leather armour look more like netherite armour
body:
This pack is designed to make the considerably lackluster other armors the same shape and style as the netherite armor is. And yes, it works fine with trims.

This includes:
Gold armor
Iron armor
Diamond armor
Leather armor

Disclaimer: I do not plan to add chainmail armor to the pack.
Disclaimer: This does not change the item textures, just the model textures.
